missingInfo: The CABLES section defines only drop connections from closures to buildings. No explicit backbone/trunk cable paths are defined from any closure back to CO-1, so the complete path from B-0 to the source cannot be determined from the topology provided.

The CABLES section defines only drop cables from closures to buildings. No trunk/backbone cables are specified that would connect CL-A or any other closure back to the source CO-1, so the path cannot be extended beyond the serving closure CL-A.
